hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+([^&|;]*[[:space:]])?(commit|push)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Project hook: Claude must never run git commit or git push. The user handles all git writes; make file changes only."}}'; fi

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); case "$f" in */database/migrations/*) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Project hook: this edits a file under database/migrations/. Never edit an already-applied migration (causes schema drift between local/test/prod). Approve only for a migration not yet run anywhere; otherwise create a NEW migration via php artisan make:migration."}}';; esac
f=$(jq -r .tool_input.file_path); case "$f" in *.php) docker exec laravel-api php artisan app:format >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac
